deadline_notes: Annual renewal. Deadline falls in the CPA's birth month (personalized).
notes: DISTINCTIVE: 80% technical floor — 96 of 120 hours must be technical subjects (accounting, auditing, BL, economics, finance, govt, IT, mgmt services, regulatory ethics, statistics, tax). Stricter than most states. 24hr external-sponsor rule since 2007: cannot be 100% firm-internal CPE. Rolling 3-year window. Nano-learning 8hr sub-cap. ~10% annual audit rate.
